title: RSVP for a Spring Tour
excerpt: Prospective and new families are invited to tour Camp Barney Medintz and meet the directors and staff. Plus, bring your questions as we love to talk about Our Summer Place. Spots are limited. RSVP is required. Saturday, May 16, 10:30 am or 12:00 pm Sunday, May 17, 1:00 or 2:30 pm Please note: Online RSVPs […]
contentHtml:
Prospective and new families are invited to tour Camp Barney Medintz and meet the directors and staff. Plus, bring your questions as we love to talk about Our Summer Place. Spots are limited. RSVP is required.

Saturday, May 16, 10:30 am or 12:00 pm
Sunday, May 17, 1:00 or 2:30 pm

Please note: Online RSVPs for spring tours have closed. Please email Debbie@CampBarney.org to request a spot.
contentText:
Prospective and new families are invited to tour Camp Barney Medintz and meet the directors and staff. Plus, bring your questions as we love to talk about Our Summer Place. Spots are limited. RSVP is required.

Saturday, May 16, 10:30 am or 12:00 pm

Sunday, May 17, 1:00 or 2:30 pm 

Please note: Online RSVPs for spring tours have closed. Please email 
Debbie@CampBarney.org
 to request a spot.
